chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1389 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5352/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 22.08.2023 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 8. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.4 to 8 files comments as well as copy of order passed in C. P. No. D-1073 of 2022 and others, and submits that the issue involved in this petition has already been decided by this Court in aforesaid petitions by an order dated 02.06.2023. Learned Counsel for petitioner does not dispute this fact and submits that this petition may be disposed of in the light of observations contained in aforesaid order, to which learned Counsel for respondents has no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application in the light of observations and directions passed by this Court in aforesaid order. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
